languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, я не понимаю, вы сомневаетесь в моей преданности? Или в воинской доблести?"
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, я не понимаю, вы сомневаетесь в моей преданности? Или в воинской доблести?"

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand why you doubt my loyalty? Or is it my prowess in battle?"
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"

languages.text: 「貴方様、なぜ私の忠誠を疑うのですか？それとも私の武勇に疑念を抱いているのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand why you doubt my loyalty? Or is it my prowess in battle?"

traits.locale_text: 「貴方様、なぜ私の忠誠を疑うのですか？それとも私の武勇に疑念を抱いているのですか？」

languages.text: "Anlamıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Neden sadakatimden şüphe ediyorsunuz? Yoksa savaşma becerilerimden mi şüphe duyuyorsunuz?"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"

traits.locale_text: "Anlamıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Neden sadakatimden şüphe ediyorsunuz? Yoksa savaşma becerilerimden mi şüphe duyuyorsunuz?"

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, no lo entiendo. ¿Acaso duda de mi lealtad? ¿O de mis capacidades en combate?».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, no lo entiendo. ¿Acaso duda de mi lealtad? ¿O de mis capacidades en combate?».

languages.text: “大人，我不明白，您在怀疑我的忠诚吗？还是说您在质疑我的作战能力？”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"

traits.locale_text: “大人，我不明白，您在怀疑我的忠诚吗？还是说您在质疑我的作战能力？”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, je ne comprends pas. Doutez-vous de ma loyauté ? À moins que vous craigniez de ne pas pouvoir compter sur moi au combat ? »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, je ne comprends pas. Doutez-vous de ma loyauté ? À moins que vous craigniez de ne pas pouvoir compter sur moi au combat ? »

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich verstehe nicht ganz. Zweifelt Ihr an meiner Loyalität? Oder an meiner Kampfkraft?"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich verstehe nicht ganz. Zweifelt Ihr an meiner Loyalität? Oder an meiner Kampfkraft?"
